reason: The current Codex plugin validator rejects hooks in plugin.json, so CodeDNA keeps hook guidance as optional local assets instead of registering unsupported manifest fields.

hooks.action: Remind Codex to run CodeDNA scan, parse, analysis, pairing, and task pack generation before implementation.

trigger_when: the user asks whether the result is safe to accept
hooks.action: Remind Codex to run CodeDNA review output and optionally update memory.
